name: Teatime Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, buttermilk, and vanilla.
4. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients using a fork to form a soft dough.
5. Gather the dough into a ball.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface; knead lightly 10 times.
7. With lightly floured hands, pat the dough into an even layer about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Using a 2-1/2-inch cookie cutter, cut the dough into rounds. Gather scraps together and use until all the dough is used up.
9. Place the scones on a lightly greased baking sheet.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown and risen.
11. Let cool on wire racks.
12. Serve warm.
